title: VillageRevival - Plains Edition
description: Overall improvement to vanilla structures and generation, adding bigger more vibrant structures while keeping a vanilla feeling.
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iQ4fcuRq/images/defa7d736781e6d9d666a7827de7d768425cc407.png)


**Village Revival** is a FORGE and FABRIC mod that aims to rework vanilla villages to gave them a better, more impactful look improving exploration of the Minecraft overworld. This initial release includes a rework for every structure in the Plains Village including the addition of extra accessories and paths. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R-EHa0RsGNs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Update 0.1.1 Released! It includes a bunch of new buildings (check the gallery on the spoilers bellow!) some bug fixes and minor changes to most buildings. The next Village Rework its also just around the corner, please consider supporting the project on patron and in social media, Enjoy the mod!
### - ~~To the Fabric bros, ill try to update asap but right now im putting my efforts into releasing the next village, please be patient.~~ 1/10/24 Fabric Version Released

![VILLAGE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iQ4fcuRq/images/398a3081e3531e109716822136a01e8209ec4090.png)

Future updates will aim to rework other biomes in the same Vanilla friendly way. 

If you enjoy this mod Please consider supporting me *([Nezumih-san](https://www.patreon.com/nezumihsan))* and *[GraySun](https://www.patreon.com/GraySun_Builds) (Who designed the all the buildings)* on Patron so we can keep working on it. Alternatively you can also support me on Ko-fi with trough the links given on the external links section of this page.

Finally if you are interested follow me on *[Twitter](https://twitter.com/Nezumih_san)*
 for information on upcoming updates and if you like to give any feed back on the mod, it would be immensely appreciated. Thank you!
